name.seedreamBot.description: Name of the SeeDream image generator

description.prompt.message: Prompt for generating or editing an image

description.model.message: Model used for generating or editing images.

description.size.message: Image size. Supports presets `1K`, `2K`, `4K` or custom `<width>x<height>`.

description.watermark.message: Whether to add an AI watermark to the generated image. Enabled by default.

description.imageUrls.message: Upload 1-14 reference images to enable image editing.

placeholder.prompt.message: Enter prompt, e.g., a white Siamese cat

message.startTaskFailed.message: Task initiation failed, please contact the administrator:

message.usedUp.message: Your credits are exhausted, please purchase more to continue using

message.uploadImageExceed.message: You can upload a maximum of 14 images

message.uploadImageError.message: Image upload failed, please try again later

model.seedream50.description: SeeDream 5.0 model option (supports image sets and streaming output)

name.maxImages.description: Number of images for generating image sets (max_images)

description.maxImages.message: Number of images generated in a single request (1-15). Set to 1 for single image mode; greater than 1 automatically enables image sets (sequential_image_generation=auto), maintaining character, style, and detail consistency across images. Only supports doubao-seedream-5.0 / 4.5 / 4.0; if reference images are uploaded, must satisfy (number of reference images + number generated) ≤ 15. Billing is based on the actual number of images generated.
